當 cpu 想要寫 one word 並發現他在不只一個 cache 中的時候，他需要告知每個cache 他要做寫入的動作

(2)when it's a dirty copy, 就需要把她寫回去記憶體
以上規則就是所謂的 cache coherence protocol

answer_text:
Cache coherence problem: A cache line may exist in multiple caches. If the cache line is modified (i.e. dirty), we must ensure all the caches has the same copies. If a CPU wants to write a cached word, it has 2 choice:
1. Invalid all other cache lines. Those which own this cache line need to refill the cache line again when they need it.
2. Broadcast the modification to all the caches, and modify the cache line in the cache.
reason: 有抓到多個 cache 的一致性與 invalidate/broadcast 概念，但未清楚交代 clean/dirty 的基本處理規則。

answer_text:
當寫入新的 cached word時，其他CPU的Cached word也要變動
規則是：如果cached word is 未修改過的，可以直接discard;如果是dirty，可以在修改前傳回給CPU或傳給writer
reason: 有說明其他 CPU 也要同步變動，且 clean 可 discard、dirty 可轉回 writer，重點完整。

answer_text: 需要保持cache資料的一致性以及被修改的順序。如果需要write a cache line, 需要先去檢查有沒有其他processor存了這個cache line，如果別的processor存的是乾淨未修改過的cache line,直接標為invalid, 如果是有修改過的cache line(dirty), 需要先寫回memory, 然後更新到目前要執行寫入的cpu的cache，才能執行write。
reason: 有提到檢查其他 processor 的副本，clean 直接 invalid，dirty 需先寫回 memory，再進行寫入。

answer_text:
在multiprocessor中如果在不同processor的相同cache block中，如果所持有的資料理論上要相同，但是因為其中有一個已經write了，導致資料的不一致，這就是cache coherence。
basic rules 就是當一個word要被寫時，會先把其他processor中的相同位置改成無效後，再改目前的processor中的資料，並將改完的資料標記為dirty
reason: 有描述多處理器同資料不一致與先讓其他副本無效，但 dirty copy 的處理說明不完整。

answer_text: when a core want to write a word that there are more than one core has a cache line of it, it has to notify those cores to maintain the coherence. it is the cache coherence problem. Then the cores being notified, if the cache line is not dirty, the core should just drop the cache line. If the cache line is dirty, it should either write the modify cache line back into memory firstly before the core who wants to write a word to maintance coherence or directly send the modified cache line to the core who wants to write a word.
reason: 有說明寫入前要通知其他 caches，clean copy 丟棄，dirty copy 先寫回或直接傳給 writer。

answer_text:
當一個資料被儲存在多個處理器的 cache 中，此資料被修改時，需要所有的 cache 皆被修改，若只有改到某部分的 cache 而非全部，會導致不同的處理器之間資料不對齊。
當 cache word 被修改時，一個系統需要廣播給所有處理器，使得擁有此 cache word 的處理器同樣修改 (或直接使他失效) 此 cache word。
reason: 有提到多個 cache 間需同步或失效化，但未說明 dirty copy 與 write-back 的規則。

answer_text:
在 MP 系統中要修改某資料，且該資料存在於多台機器的 cache，會遵循以下的方式：
1. 若該機器上的 cache 是 clean 的，則可以直接丟棄
2. 若該機器上的 cache 是 dirty 的，則須先將其 write-back 回主記憶體，或是傳送給要寫入他的 CPU．
reason: 有正確說明 clean copy 直接丟棄、dirty copy 需寫回 memory 或轉給 writer。

answer_text:
when the write resquest happen on the data which is accessd by one more cache.
if the copy is clean which means it hasn't been modify, then the old copy can be disgarded and change to the new version.
if the copy has been modify, then it need to be sent to the memory before the write request continue to processed, or it can directly send to the writer.

answer_text: When a CPU wants to write a word that is in more than one cache, the system needs to inform all caches of the writing request. Like when its clean can just throw it or when its dirty we have to take other steps. These rules for dealing cache consistency are cache coherence protocol.
reason: 有提到需通知所有 cache 與 clean/dirty 的概念，但處理規則過於概括，不夠完整。

answer_text: Cache Coherence problem : when a CPU wants to write a cached word that has many copied in other caches, then the writing operation must inform all the other copies. If the copy is clean, just discard it, if the copy is dirty, it should be written back to memory or update the information to the cache that will be written. This prevent the data inconsistency.
reason: 有說明寫入時需通知其他副本，clean 直接丟棄，dirty 需寫回 memory 或更新到寫入方。

answer_text: The cpu desired to write must broadcast other cpu who has the cache copy. If one cpu has the clean copy, just discard it. If cpu has dirty copy, it must write back the word before the desired cpu write.
reason: 有提到廣播給其他 CPU、clean copy 丟棄、dirty copy 先寫回後再寫入，核心規則到位。

answer_text:
There are several levels of cache (l1, l2, ...), some of them can be accessed by several cpus. This introduces cache coherence problem, because some cache may have stale data which other cpu may need to access.

when CPU wants to write a word to the cache, it has to check the data located in the address the CPU wants to write to.
If that data is clean (nothing was written to the address), then CPU can directly write to it without additional work.
If that data is dirty (it was written and not saved to the memory yet), then CPU should write this data to the higher level cache or memory and mark the same data on other lower level caches as invalid.
reason: 有抓到 coherence 的不一致問題，並說明 clean 可直接寫、dirty 需先寫回並使其他副本失效。

answer_text: When CPU want a word that many caches have, the "read" and "write" should be considered because of the consistency of the cache. When CPU uses "read", each cache for the word should be "read-only"; When CPU uses "write", the dirty bit should be noticed. If the bit in other caches is clean, CPU directly writes, and then discard the word in other caches. If not, the cache in the CPU takes the copy from the cache's word with the dirty bit, and then CPU use "write".
reason: 有提到 dirty bit 與其他 cache 丟棄的方向，但讀寫混在一起，寫入規則表達不夠清楚。

answer_text:

If a CPU wants to write a cached work, it should notify all other CPU who has the same cache. and mark it as faild.
reason: 有定義 cache coherence 與通知其他 CPU，但只寫到 mark failed，未說明 clean/dirty 的基本處理。

answer_text:
If CPU A wants to write a cached word, it notifies all other CPUs 
- if CPU B has a clean copy, it discards it
- if CPU B has a dirty copy, either it sends the dirty copy to all other CPUs before CPU A's write instruction is executed, or it sends the dirty copy to CPU A before it sends the write instruction 

When a CPU wants to write a cached word, it needs to invalidate all other copies of this word that other CPUs may hold
reason: 有正確說明通知其他 CPU、clean copy 丟棄、dirty copy 需先處理後才能寫入。

answer_text:
Cache coherence problem : When a cpu wants to write on a data which is located on several sites.
Cache coherence protocol : When a cpu wants to write on a data, it informs all the caches of this actions.
- if the data is not stored elsewhere, the cpu write on the data.
- if the date is stored on another cache : 
----- if the data is not dirty then it is discard
----- if the data is dirty then it is sent to the memory or directly to the writer.
- after the cpu has written, it send the new version to the other caches.
reason: 有說明通知所有 caches、clean copy 丟棄、dirty copy 送回 memory 或 writer，且能描述後續更新。

answer_text:
cache coherence problem happens when a cache is shared among multiple CPU. When writing a cached word, we need to make sure that there is no other CPU have access to this cache, or otherwise problems will happen.

If the CPU has clean cache, then it can just discard this. If the CPU has dirty cache, it can either save this to memory or pass this to other cache before the writing request, This procedure to deal with cache coherence problem is called cache coherence procedure.

answer_text:
Cache Coherence problem means when there are multiple copies appears in different caches, it is necessary to maintain the consistency among different caches.
The basic rules for maintaining the cache coherence is when a cache line appears in many caches, when a CPU want to write to that specific cache line, it will inform all the caches that have that specific cache. For each processor that has the specific cache line:
  1. If the cache line is clean, just discard that cache line.
  2. If the cache line is dirty, the cache line need to be written back to the memory first or send to the processor that want to write the cache line.
reason: 有完整說明多個 cache 的一致性，以及 clean 丟棄、dirty 寫回或轉給寫入方。

answer_text:
Cache Coherence problem: the same data in the caches of different processors may have different value at some timesteps which violates the coherence.
To avoid the issue, a system must follow cache coherence protocal. Everytime a CPU wants to write a cached word, it need to check all the processors which have the same cached word whether the data is clean or dirty(modified). If clean, drop it directly. If dirty, write back to the memory and then executing the writing.
reason: 有完整說明多處理器副本的一致性問題，且 clean 丟棄、dirty 寫回 memory 後再寫入。

answer_text:
1. Cache Coherence problem: 不同cache 會存取相同資料, 所以當要修改某個cache中的資料時 剩下的cache 內的資料會變成舊資料, 最終會形成資料不同步的情形

當我要改cache 內的資料之前,先通知其他有這些資料的cache
去檢查:
 1. clean copy: 可以直接discard
 2. dirty copy: 需要先將舊的data copy 丟回去back memory 或者回傳給當初寫這個data copy的writer.完成後才可以修改資料
以上是cache coherence protocol

系統在CPU寫入前要確認其他 CPU caches 的 word 是 clean or dirty ， clean 可直接刪除， dirty 要先寫入或把資料交給現在要寫入的 CPU，來確保 Cache consistency。
reason: 有說明多個 cache 的一致性問題，以及 clean 可刪除、dirty 需先寫入或交給寫入 CPU。

answer_text:
在multiprocessor系統中，多個CPU在各自的local cache會存有相同的資料副本，當某個CPU修改了資料，那其他CPU的快取持有的副本就會變過時的，如何讓所有CPU持有的都是最新且一致的副本，這就是cache coherence problem。
當某個快取要修改資料，
如果其他快取持有的是乾淨的副本，那直接將其設為失效或捨棄就好。
如果其他快取持有的是修改過(dirty/modified)的版本，那麼該快取需要先將資料寫回主記憶體，或是直接傳給發出寫入請求的CPU
reason: 有完整描述多個 local cache 的一致性問題，並說明 clean 副本失效、dirty 副本先寫回或轉給寫入方。

answer_text: 當多個 CPU 的快取擁有同一分資料的複本時，若其中一個 CPU 進行寫入，系統必須要求其他 CPU 丟棄(Clean) 或更新(Dirty)該資料，以維持資料一致性。
reason: 有提到同份資料複本與寫入時需處理其他 CPU，但對 dirty 的實際處理不夠具體。

answer_text: 當想要write時，系統會先去檢查其他node所保有的copy，若copy是clean，就直接丟棄即可，但若copy是dirty，要在write之前先把dirty copy write back回去。
reason: 有說明檢查其他 copy，clean 直接丟棄，dirty 在寫入前先 write back。

answer_text:
The CPU must see consistent values with shared data. When a single cache line exists in multiple caches and one CPU writes, the file must be invalidated or updated.
Clean copies can be discarded.
Dirty (modified) copies must be written back or transferred. This set of rules is referred to as Cache Coherence Protocol to deal with the Cache Coherence problem.
reason: 有正確說明多副本一致性問題，且 clean 可丟棄、dirty 需寫回或轉送。

answer_text: Cache coherent problem is when there is more than one copy of a word cashe in different CPU. For a CPU to write a cached word, it has to invalidate other cached word and update the old cache to new value of that particular cache.
reason: 有提到 invalidate 其他 cache，但未說明 clean/dirty 的基本處理細節。

answer_text:
Cache Coherence happens when a writer wants to write more than the size of the cache 
The rule should follow:
the system notifies all the caches.
If the cache is clean, discard it.
If the cache is dirty, write it back to the memory or transfer it to the cache that the writer is going to write.
reason: 有說明系統通知所有 cache，clean 丟棄，dirty 寫回 memory 或轉交給 writer。

answer_text: When write the data which has multiple caches, the system needs to notify all caches of the write request. If the cache has clean copy, it can discard the copy. If the cache has dirty copy, it needs to write the modified copy back into memory before the write operation or transfer the modified copy directly to the writer.
reason: 有完整說明需通知所有 cache，clean 丟棄，dirty 寫回 memory 或直接轉給 writer。

answer_text: We should make sure that the data shared by CPUs should be the same. If we want to wirte a cache block, we invalidate or modify the block in other CPUs.
reason: 有提到共享資料要一致與其他 CPU 的處理，但只說 invalidate/modify，未完整交代 dirty 規則。

answer_text: Cache conherence problem 是指 因為一個cache line 同時存在於多個ＣＰＵ cache 內，因此若是不對此做同步處理，則可能會因爲兩個CPU 於自己的cache 內的同一個 cache line 寫入資料，進而造成的inconsistency 問題。 因此若要解決此問題，則需要ＣＰＵ在寫入某個cache line 前，先去對於該cache line 於其他cache 內的資料 做 invalidation 後，才可以做寫入的動作。
reason: 有說明同一 cache line 存於多個 cache 會造成不一致，寫入前需先做 invalidation。

Cache Coherence problem means that the data is stored in several copies in each processes , therefore if new write command arrives , there will be mainly two situations . 
1. If the data is clean , just simply discard it . 
2. If the data is dirty , it can write back to the memory before the new write executes .

Cache Coherence problem means the same cache line in each cache has to be same when used.
If a CPU wants to write a cached word, there are two cases:
1. The cache line in other caches are clean
In this case, the CPU can just write a cached word, and the cache line in other caches can just discard.
2. The cache line in some other caches are dirty
In this case, the CPU cannot just write a cached word.
It has to update the cache line or receive the modified cached word before it start write a cached word.

Cache Coherence describes a MP/Distributed System that many CPUs cache the same data that one wants to write. If their's dirty cache, it must passed the information for other cache machinisms to update memory and caches. After that, the CPU can start to write.

The cache coherence problem is that the cache line in each CPU needs to be the same. 
When a CPU wants to write a cached word, if the data in the cache is not modified, the cpu simply discard the cache. However, if the data in the cache is already modified, the data in the cache line has to be first saved in to the memory, and then the cpu write data into the cahce.

在多處理器系統中，當同一筆資料複製到多個CPU的Cache中時，如果某一個CPU修改了該筆資料值時，其他的Cache中副本可能仍是舊值，而導致資料不一致問題，因此系統必須透過一玫性協議來確保所有對應該資料的內容保持一致性。
